description: Segment learners or entities into cohorts and compare metric performance across segments to identify patterns and disparities.

transformations: group metrics by segment_dimension (org_unit, role, region, training_type)
optional: compute trend per segment over time

cce_config.uses: segment/cohort framing — identify whether performance differences across cohorts are driven by different causal pathways

recommender_instructions.metric_selection_bias: prefer metrics that can be sliced by the user's segment dimension; deprioritize global-aggregate-only metrics
recommender_instructions.output_guidance: each recommended metric should include segment_dimension (how to slice it), expected_segments (list of segment values), and natural_language_question that queries per-segment breakdown
recommender_instructions.causal_usage: optional — use causal edges to explain why certain segments perform differently

penalty_rules: penalize metrics that cannot be segmented by any dimension (-0.15)
penalize metrics with uniform values across segments (no analytical value) (-0.08)
boost_rules: boost metrics with natural segment dimension in their schema (+0.10)
boost metrics where segment disparity is known to be high (+0.08)
boost metrics with trend capability per segment (+0.05)
